posts.author: atishay_jain1
posts.text: On this, I don’t see any cause of concern. Growth is in line with industry standards. Last year QoQ growth was there because of low base but this time base is high due to discounts offered by the company in Q4FY26.

posts.author: Agnivesh_narmeta
posts.text: Hi Murali, Thanks for the detailed analysis. My question is very fundamental in nature or might sound even basic. But this is bugging me from few months. There is a clear mis communication from promotors end. So should we take it as : They are new to listed markets. Hence making these mistakes and will correct with time OR There are more cockroaches in the books that yet to be surfaced. Borrowed conviction is not a great idea but still want to know if even I am thinking in the right direction. Disclaimer: Invested

posts.author: Krishna_Kumar
posts.text: Mgt Commentary Q4- we always were in the range of 25%, previously it was 20% with, you know, with gold going up as a, you know, as interest, it had gone to 25%, 28%. my whole the bullion or the gold bar this year is in the range of 32%. Q4 had been such where it had gone to 40%. But I think this year it should again stabilize back to the 25% or even lower levels. posts.author: murali603
posts.text: Q1FY27 Update: They can put an obsolute numbers aswell like previous press releases, now people will get confused with these % numbers and company will come up with some other book cleaning technique they did in last quarter. 41% YoY growth means there is no meaning of celebrations, actuallly 31% de growth QoQ, in the last FY they grown QoQ from Q4FY25-Q1FY26. 22% bullion sales mentioned is part of retail revenue, where as there is some seperate bullion sale (B2B) segment as shared in Q4 business updsate, which is not published in Q1 update. so we don’t know what is the overall bullion sales (…

posts.author: atishay_jain1
posts.text: Good Q1FY27 update, 41% revenue growth YoY Retail growth at 56% SSSG good - 46% But franchise at 8% and e-commerce at 20% growth YoY is not as per expectations. Franchise growth is important because out of total 25 stores planned to open in FY27, 18-20 will be franchise only! If franchise doesn’t bring growth, overall business can’t grow much in medium term. Seems margins will be better this time as stud ratio has improved and bullion sales have stabilized to 22% from 40% in Q4FY26. Seems QIP will be done in CY27 because Promoter may not be interested in raising funds when they feel the stock…
